title: DTO
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Pirro says DOJ won't drop Fed probe, will appeal judge's order blocking Powell subpoenas
items.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of targeting him for refusing to obey Trump's demand that the Fed sharply lower interest rates.

items.title: U.S. Senate votes to advance $70 billion funding plan for ICE, Border Patrol
